abstract: The object for applying styles to rows in a table.
overview:
## Discussion

You can apply styles that affect the look of the table rows, including the row background color, the color of the divider lines between rows, and the height of a row. For example, you could add a blue background color and apply a medium-gray divider to each row in your table.

You can also set up conditional row styles — styles applied only to rows that meet certain criteria. For example, you could apply a background shading to all odd-numbered rows. See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalTableRowStyle].

You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/TableStyle].

### Example

items.description: Apply table styles, such as borders and backgrounds, to the rows, columns, and cells in your HTML and JSON  tables.
items.name: Defining and Using Table Styles

items.description: The object for defining a style for rows, columns, cells, and headers in a table.
items.name: TableStyle

items.description: The object for applying styles to table rows that meet certain conditions.
items.name: ConditionalTableRowStyle

items.description: The object for defining conditions that apply a conditional style to a row.
items.name: TableRowSelector

items.description: The object for applying styles to columns in a table.
items.name: TableColumnStyle

items.description: The object for applying styles to table columns that meet certain conditions.
items.name: ConditionalTableColumnStyle

items.description: The object for defining conditions that apply a conditional style to a column.
items.name: TableColumnSelector

items.description: The object for applying styles to cells in a table.
items.name: TableCellStyle

items.description: The object for applying a style to table cells that meet certain conditions.
items.name: ConditionalTableCellStyle

items.description: The object for defining conditions that apply a conditional style to a cell.
items.name: TableCellSelector

items.description: The object for setting borders for tables.
items.name: TableBorder

items.description: The object for defining the color, width, and style of a stroke in a table.
items.name: TableStrokeStyle

items.description: The object for defining space around the content in a table cell.
items.name: Padding

items.description: The object for specifying formatted text content and styling for captions in table cells.
items.name: FormattedText

title: TableRowStyle
